column1: # Provenance: 22 obligation-year ROC-price rows transcribed from Ofgem transparency-document PDFs.
# Buyout + recycle + e-ROC clearing + mutualisation totals per scheme year SY02-03 through SY23-24.
# Per-PDF sha256 + retrieved_on chain lives in the sibling .meta.json sources[] array (D-03).
# the cross-check anchor — values here must reconcile within ±3% per scheme year (D-14 hard block).
# D-11: mutualisation_gbp_total is non-zero ONLY for SY 2021-22 (one-off ROC supplier-default event).
# All other obligation years carry mutualisation_gbp_total=0.
